items.question: A dataset has `product_category` with 15 nominal levels and `device_id` with 50,000 levels. What encoding workflow do you recommend?
options: One-hot category; bucket or frequency-encode device_id with train-only statistics
items.answer: One-hot category; bucket or frequency-encode device_id with train-only statistics
items.explanation: Low-cardinality nominal category fits one-hot; 50k-level device_id needs compression (bucketing, frequency, hash, or CV target encoding)—not full one-hot expansion.

items.question: Where should canonical definitions of one-hot and target encoding be documented in this curriculum?
items.explanation: Encoding Categoricals owns one-hot, ordinal, and target definitions; this topic links there and focuses on pipeline workflow.

items.question: Why save `joblib.dump(pipe, ...)` instead of dumping only the trained classifier?
options: The pipeline includes fitted encoders whose vocabularies production must reuse
items.answer: The pipeline includes fitted encoders whose vocabularies production must reuse
items.explanation: Predictions require the same encoded feature matrix the model was trained on—encoders are part of the deployable artifact.

items.question: You run GridSearchCV on a Pipeline with OneHotEncoder. What leakage risk remains if you add a naive target encoder to the same Pipeline?
options: Target means computed in-sample during fit can still leak labels
GridSearchCV always refits on test data
items.answer: Target means computed in-sample during fit can still leak labels
items.explanation: Pipeline ensures encoders refit per CV fold on train splits, but target encoders must still use out-of-fold statistics—not row's own label.

items.question: A new `payment_provider` label appears in production. Best practice after training with `OneHotEncoder(handle_unknown='ignore')`?
options: Call fit on the new row immediately
Transform with the saved encoder—unknown maps to all-zero; monitor and schedule retrain
items.answer: Transform with the saved encoder—unknown maps to all-zero; monitor and schedule retrain
items.explanation: Frozen training artifact plus documented unknown handling; refitting online breaks consistency—retrain on schedule when drift is significant.
